item.title: TANGENT ENDOSCOPY, LLC: Tangent Endoscopy, Tangent Single Use Digital Catheter. Model Numbers: (1) TNG4002-IND. (2) TNG-4007-6pk. Recall
item.product: Tangent Endoscopy, Tangent Single Use Digital Catheter. Model Numbers: (1) TNG4002-IND. (2) TNG-4007-6pk.
item.summary: Affected devices exhibited fractures at the distal shaft tip without complete detachment. Product details: Tangent Endoscopy, Tangent Single Use Digital Catheter. Model Numbers: (1) TNG4002-IND. (2) TNG-4007-6pk.
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution in the states of North Carolina, Arizona, and Nevada.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
